entry.title: TJCTF 2025- airport
entry.content:
✈️ Airport - TJC 2025 CTF WriteupChallenge Name: airportCategory: Misc
🧩 Challenge Description i made a mIstake and got lost, i always lose traCk of where i am oh no somebody kidnApped me please find where i am save me before i gO on this horrific planetjctf{uppercasecode}
A single image file was provided:
lost.png
Step-by-Step Solution1. 🧠 Hidden Clues in DescriptionLooking at the capitalized letters in the challenge description: i made a mIstake and got lost, i always lose traCk of where i am oh no somebody kidnApped me please find where i am save me before i gO We extract: I C A O This hints that the answer is an ICAO airport code — 4-letter international airport identifier.
2. 🖼️ Visual Inspection of the ImageThe image (lost.png) shows:
A gate monitor display at an airport. Text in Spanish (e.g., “PUERTA” and “SÁBADO”). A visible fragment: "UST" (likely part of a destination name). This suggests a Spanish-speaking country, probably in Latin America.
3. 🧾 Metadata ExtractionUsing exiftool on the image: I find:- City : LIMA This gives a strong hint that the photo was taken in Lima, Peru. ICAO Code LookupSearching for the ICAO code of Jorge Chávez International Airport (Lima, Peru): ICAO code: SPIM Final Flag: tjctf{SPIM}
